action_items.action: URGENT — Reply to Jessica Dordevic DM (30 Apr 15:05 BST): 'Let me know about the banners please so I'll check with Ciara after.' Jessica is actively iterating on GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners and GDCU-8546 Tinder Style and is waiting on Mike's call. You already confirmed that pass/interested buttons should hide after a match ('No once you have matched they should go') and asked her to remove 'betting' from 'betting match'. Still pending: confirm the banner designs are approved so she can close GDCU-8928.

REVIEW — GDCU-8895 Prediction Market Page Not on US Sitemap (Sanja Budic, High, In Product since ~01/05/2026). Sanja needs Mike to review before sign-off. Scope: add 'Prediction' header to US sitemap, link to /us/prediction-markets, add Prediction Reviews logic for brand reviews. Compliance note: must NOT appear under 'Betting' headers. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Michael Butlin, Eoin McCarthy, Joshua Smith.

ESCALATE — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll) is Blocked for Day 18+ (since 16/04/2026). Last updated 30 Apr. Carried into new sprint. This is now the longest-standing open blocker on the board. Ciara is also carrying GDCU-8736 and GDCU-8947. Clear the specific blocker today or escalate to Colin Brannigan.

DECISION NEEDED — Joshua Smith posted in #gdc-product-design-pod on 01/05 (bank holiday Friday): 'One for when you are all back from bank holidays. We need to make a decision on the designs for GDCU-8787 Carousel Banner Shortcode.' Options: (A) reuse Simple Banner shortcode + navigation arrows — reduces editor complexity; (B) use Free Games banner style — different layout, cannot reuse existing shortcode. Joshua favours Option A (mockup created). Mike is a stakeholder — respond to Joshua's message today.

HEADS UP — Miguel Migneco is OFF tomorrow Tuesday 05/05 (notified Mike by DM on 30 Apr: 'hey Mike I am off next Tue'). Miguel completed GDCU-8512 (Always On Betting Tips, Done ✅) and was working on Tinder-related Claude Design admin section prototypes. Ensure no In Product items are waiting on Miguel for tomorrow. Consider whether GDCU-8813 (Ace Navigation UI Audit — no longer in review queue) was formally signed off before the long weekend.

WELCOME BACK — Vic Dadson returns tomorrow Tuesday 05/05 from ~2 weeks sick leave (off since ~21/04). Plan a brief check-in for Tuesday morning. Outstanding item flagged in previous reports: data engineering options discussion. Review her backlog before she's back so she can hit the ground running.

SIGN OFF — GDCU-8736 Learning Hub Imagery (Ciara Carroll, Medium, In Product since 28/04). Ciara shared Figma prototype. Approving this unblocks Carlos Blauth's dev work on GDCU-8733 (Apply Feedback to Learning Hub). Back-and-forth noted by Chloe at sprint close on 30 Apr — check with Ciara what the latest state is before signing off.

CHECK IN — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Active DM conversation on 30 Apr — Jessica making updates per Mike's direction (hide buttons after match, remove 'betting' label). Chloe noted in sprint close she expected Jessica to close this shortly. Confirm with Jessica today whether she's ready to move to In Product.

ACKNOWLEDGE — Ciara Carroll's Claude Design Guidelines post in #core-product (29 Apr 15:49 BST) has been delivered — this was GDCU-8893's key deliverable. Comprehensive guide covering what Claude Design is, team etiquette, dos/don'ts, and GDC's live design system (gamblingcom-brand.netlify.app). GDCU-8893 is now Done ✅. Mike should publicly endorse and amplify Ciara's announcement across core-product/gdc-product-design-pod this week if not already done.

FOLLOW UP — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Carried into new sprint (confirmed by Chloe 30 Apr). Was bounced from In Product back to In Progress on 29 Apr. Chloe's outstanding feedback: confirm logo name/size sourced from Origins. Check with Jessica where this stands and when it will be ready for review.

MONITOR — GDCU-8877 Add Field to Manage Phone Numbers on Email Confirmation Pages (Novica Vukobratovic, In Progress). Updated this morning 07:28 BST despite bank holiday — someone is working. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Corey Cunningham. No PM action needed yet but note it is active today.

DM GABRIEL — Gabriel Cornoiu posted in #gdc-pdmt on 01/05: 'I'm free most of the morning, send me a DM if you want to discuss anything.' Outstanding stakeholder intake questions from 23/04 remain unanswered: (1) 'Other' option in offer ordering dropdown behaviour, (2) 'new OpList' clarification. Today is a bank holiday but flag this for first thing Tuesday.

CREATIVE DIRECTION — GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Carried from previous sprint. Josh Kerr feedback: needs rethinking — clearer message, less 'gaming' feel. Creative direction needed from Mike before Ciara can proceed. With Ciara also carrying GDCU-8619, GDCU-8736, GDCU-8947, consider prioritising this in next sprint planning.
